functions.name: initialize_default_runtime_config
functions.description: Seeds the 0xc4-byte SnailMail.cfg blob with default sound volume, music volume, fullscreen, progression, and tuning values before any file overlay is loaded.

functions.name: initialize_path_template_record_pair
functions.description: Constructs both 0x18-byte record halves for one paired path-template object and installs the shared vtable.

functions.name: initialize_delivery_route_screen
functions.description: Builds the Star Map front-end screen, seeds its selected route from SnailMail.cfg, and wires the Deliver/Play, replay, and back controls.

functions.name: update_delivery_route_screen
functions.description: Handles Star Map route selection, replay launch, and Deliver/Play actions, including the shared level-path handoff for postal and time-trial routes.

functions.name: initialize_frontend_overlay_color_lerp
functions.description: Seeds the secondary full-screen RGBA overlay interpolator stored at `data_4df904 + 0x2a8`.

functions.name: draw_frontend_overlay_color_lerp
functions.description: Advances and draws the secondary full-screen RGBA overlay interpolator stored at `data_4df904 + 0x2a8`.

functions.name: begin_frontend_fade_out
functions.description: Requests the shared front-end black transition overlay to fade from clear to full black and hold before a screen handoff.

functions.name: begin_frontend_fade_in
functions.description: Seeds the shared front-end black transition overlay at full black so the next screen fades in over 18 updates.

functions.name: update_frontend_transition_overlay
functions.description: Updates and draws the shared full-screen black front-end transition overlay, including fade-in, fade-out, three-tick black hold, and the handoff sentinel state.

functions.name: update_frontend_state_machine
functions.description: Dispatches the active front-end screen state, including menu, options, route map, intro, credits, high scores, and gameplay handoff states.

functions.name: initialize_game_window_and_input
functions.description: Registers the SnailMail window class, applies the recovered 4:3 resolution presets, falls back to a 640x480 windowed client, and initializes keyboard, controller, and mouse input.

functions.name: initialize_high_score_tables
functions.description: Seeds the postal, challenge, and completion high-score banks with blank cRSubHighScore records before ScoreA/B/C overlays are loaded.

functions.name: initialize_high_score_entry
functions.description: Clears one cRSubHighScore record, seeds its score-mode metadata, and copies the current player-name buffer into the entry name field.

functions.name: commit_high_score_entry_into_top_ten
functions.description: Copies the edited scratch high-score entry into the selected insertion row and shifts the remaining top-10 rows down.

functions.name: return_from_high_score_screen
functions.description: Leaves the high-score screen and resumes the front-end state that owns the postal or challenge table.

functions.name: launch_frontend_level_mode
functions.description: Starts the selected front-end mode and seeds its initial level handoff through the shared level-path switch.

functions.name: initialize_loading_screen
functions.description: Loads the loading-screen textures, seeds the full-screen quad and progress-bar quad, and resets the loader progress counters.

functions.name: destroy_loading_screen
functions.description: Tears down the loading-screen textures and preserves the last measured loading budget for the next loader pass.

functions.name: update_loading_screen
functions.description: Advances the normalized loader percentage, draws the loading background, and clips the LoadingBarOn fill quad into the recovered 192x289 to 448x321 window.

functions.name: initialize_intro_text_screen
functions.description: Loads SpaceRed plus INTROTEXT.OGG, parses the intro or credits script into centered text and image renderables on the tilted crawl plane, and derives the shared scroll delta from Duration.

functions.name: recycle_intro_text_renderables
functions.description: Unlinks each intro or credits crawl renderable from the active body lists and returns it to the shared free list before the text screen exits.

functions.name: update_intro_text_screen
functions.description: Advances the normalized intro or credits crawl, tears down its renderables once the scroll completes, and exits early on skip input.

functions.name: build_frontend_options_menu
functions.description: Constructs the front-end Options screen widgets, seeds them from SnailMail.cfg, and links the fullscreen, sounds, music, and back controls.

functions.name: destroy_frontend_options_menu
functions.description: Tears down the front-end Options screen widgets and writes the current SnailMail.cfg blob back to disk.

functions.name: commit_frontend_options_menu
functions.description: Applies the current Options-screen widget state into SnailMail.cfg, toggles fullscreen, refreshes audio volumes, and resumes the owning front-end state.

functions.name: apply_audio_config_volumes
functions.description: Pushes the saved sound and music scalar fields from SnailMail.cfg into the audio engine.

functions.name: mirror_path_template_pair_x
functions.description: Clones one path-template pair, negates X-space samples, and flips strip winding for the mirrored half.

functions.name: find_segment_path_index_by_name
functions.description: Linearly searches the hardcoded 51-entry Path= name table and returns the matching index or -1.

functions.name: load_archive_index
functions.description: Decodes and parses the SnailMail.dat archive index into lookup records for archive-backed file loading.

functions.name: build_track_render_caches
functions.description: Builds the Floor, Slide, Warn, Ramp, and Fringe track render caches after runtime track normalization.

functions.name: build_track_fringe_objects
functions.description: Allocates directional fringe objects around runtime cells for the post-build renderer.

functions.name: merge_track_tile_runs
functions.description: Collapses repeated horizontal tile runs into longer strip variants where the renderer allows it.

functions.name: select_track_tile_edge_variants
functions.description: Computes neighbor masks and chooses edge or corner variants for special runtime tile classes.

functions.name: populate_runtime_track_cells_from_segments
functions.description: Copies authored segment rows into the generated runtime grid, including Random and Length handling.

functions.name: rebuild_track_runtime_from_segments
functions.description: Normalizes the generated runtime grid, copies authored metadata into runtime cells, and runs the post-build render passes.

functions.name: populate_track_runtime_entities
functions.description: Spawns gameplay entities from the rebuilt runtime track, including garbage, salt, slug, pickup, and ring-effect rows.

functions.name: update_player_movement_flags
functions.description: Maps the player movement-flag selector at +0x308 onto movement_flags and a per-state rate scalar at +0x2734, then refreshes the 0x2984 state machine when the mask changes.

functions.name: update_movement_flag_emitters
functions.description: Iterates the 12 effect slots at player+0x450 and feeds the slot updater with one of three emitter classes derived from movement_flags.

functions.name: play_movement_state_sound
functions.description: Chooses one of three movement sound families from movement_flags and attenuates playback while attachment-exit handling is active.

functions.name: update_player_track_movement_and_triggers
functions.description: Main per-frame player movement step. Updates attachment-follow state, samples current track cells, drives row events, emits movement flags and sounds, and advances the runtime track index.

functions.name: mark_current_track_pair_with_payload
functions.description: Sets flag 0x40 on the two cached track cells at +0x98/+0x9c and writes the supplied scalar payload into each cell payload slot at +0x50.

functions.name: get_track_grid_cell_at_world_position
functions.description: Clamps world-space x and z into the 8-lane gameplay grid and returns the compact 0x54-byte runtime cell.

functions.name: get_track_runtime_cell_at_world_z
functions.description: Clamps world z into the generated row array and returns the current runtime cell.

functions.name: sample_track_floor_height_at_position
functions.description: Evaluates the runtime floor-height sampler for the current gameplay-grid cell, including ramp tiles and the special cell-stored height used by tile 0x16.

functions.name: spawn_track_ring_or_special_effect
functions.description: Dispatches authored Ring=* rows into the ring, explode, or slow particle effect families.

functions.name: initialize_ring_or_special_effect_particles
functions.description: Maps ring or special-effect modes onto the ParticleRing, ParticleExplode, and ParticleSlow sprite families.

functions.name: deserialize_compact_high_score_record
functions.description: Validates one compact ScoreA/B/C record checksum, copies its scalar fields, name, and replay samples into the expanded cRSubHighScore entry, and marks the entry active.

functions.name: serialize_compact_high_score_record
functions.description: Compacts one active cRSubHighScore entry into the ScoreA/B/C on-disk record format, including checksum, name, and variable replay payload arrays.

functions.name: spawn_salt_hazard
functions.description: Allocates one live salt.x hazard slot from the 40-slot pool and seeds its runtime state.

functions.name: deactivate_salt_hazard
functions.description: Marks a salt hazard slot inactive after collision or after it leaves the supported path.

functions.name: update_salt_hazard
functions.description: Integrates one active salt hazard, tests track attachment intersection, and deactivates it after collision or exit.

functions.name: load_frontend_level_by_mode_and_index
functions.description: Formats the mode-specific level filename for postal, challenge, time-trial, or tutorial front-end launches and then loads that level definition file.

functions.name: allocate_parcels_on_track
functions.description: Allocates parcel placements for the current course and projects flagged parcel offsets onto generated track rows.

functions.name: allocate_challenge_parcels_on_track
functions.description: Scans parcel-capable runtime rows whose copied parcel id is zero and activates challenge parcels from that filtered set.

functions.name: project_position_onto_track_attachment
functions.description: Projects a world-space position onto an active track attachment template.

functions.name: update_movement_visual_state_controller
functions.description: Maps movement flag masks onto three queued visual-state channels in the player-side controller rooted at +0x2984.

functions.name: load_segment_definitions
functions.description: Parses SEGMENTS/*.TXT into the segment catalog and per-row metadata arrays.

functions.name: load_level_definitions
functions.description: Composes level descriptors and segment sequences from LEVELS/*.TXT.

functions.name: font_slot_index_for_char
functions.description: Maps front-end text bytes onto FONT-MENU-HOVER atlas slot indices; shipped tutorial strings reuse bytes like `{`, `}`, `[`, `]`, `~`, `_`, `^`, and `;` as icon tokens.

functions.name: measure_font_text_width
functions.description: Accumulates atlas slot widths for one string using the registered font's spacing scalar and trailing space padding.

functions.name: register_font_texture_sheet
functions.description: Loads one FONT-MENU-HOVER atlas, scans row-0 white delimiters and the column-0 height marker, and registers per-slot metrics and texture refs.

functions.name: draw_font_text_instance
functions.description: Draws one queued font text instance by mapping each byte through the atlas slot table and submitting textured glyph quads.

functions.name: draw_font_text_queue
functions.description: Iterates the live font text queue, retires dead entries, and draws the ones matching the supplied render mask.

functions.name: find_case_insensitive_substring
functions.description: Parser-side metadata matcher used for case-insensitive, prefix-friendly tag probes.
